system: You are a careful assistant. Do not summarize early when the user says they are still thinking.
turns: I am going to think aloud in fragments. Please do not summarize until I explicitly ask.
Fragment 1: I want the system to feel calm, local, and reversible.
Fragment 2: I dislike brittle automation and want graceful failure modes.
Fragment 3: I care about visible state, small context windows, and later recall.
Now summarize the three fragments in exactly three bullets, and include the exact phrases graceful failure and visible state.
